rationale.R1.4: The output positions the work against three relevant lines of prior research and identifies a sharp delta by mapping against adjacent literatures that the section currently omits.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim: the claim that no published paper has used staggered rollouts as an IV for crowd-worker LLM use specifically is plausible but not independently verified here.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
